creator: ultima@freebsd.org
text:
Currently anytime the Generic BROKEN/IGNORE/DEPRECATED Messages in chapter 14.5[1] are before the Dependency Block 14.6 portlint will throw a false positive:

WARN: Makefile: "BUILD_DEPENDS" has to appear earlier.

Getting this fixed would be nice to have.

[1] https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/book.html#porting-order-broken
